fun_fact: What's too hot for the human body? Current heat levels are testing human physiological limits — recent weeks have seen many heatwave deaths. A recent paper estimates India could see up to 30,000 excess deaths in a single 5-day heatwave. [See the paper](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/environmental-health/articles/10.3389/fenvh.2026.1789071/full).
